chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI First Appeal No.91 of 2022 Muhammad Rashid Noorani Versus J.S Bank Limited Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For order son CMA 5716/23 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA 3568/22 Dated: 15.12.2023 Mr. S. Wasi Hyder Jafri for appellant. Mr. S. Aijaz Hussain Shirazi for respondent. -.-.- Urgency granted. Learned counsel for appellant submits that the dispute between the parties is settled and hence as a result of it he has been instructed by the appellant not to press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge
